---
title: "Function Reference"
---

Complete reference for the tabviz public API. Functions are grouped by purpose; each name links to its detail page.

## Entry points

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| [`tabviz()`](tabviz.qmd) | **Main entry point** — interactive table with any mix of columns. |
| [`forest_plot()`](forest_plot.qmd) | Convenience wrapper that auto-builds a forest column from `point` / `lower` / `upper` (or `effects`). |
| [`web_spec()`](tabviz.qmd) | Alias of `tabviz(..., .spec_only = TRUE)` — return a `WebSpec` instead of a widget. |
| [`split_table()`](split_table.qmd) | Build a `SplitForest` from a spec / widget / data frame. |

```r
# Build a table with a forest plot column
tabviz(data, label = "study", columns = list(
  viz_forest(point = "hr", lower = "lo", upper = "hi"),
  col_numeric("hr", "HR"),
  col_pvalue("pval")
))

# Quick forest plot
forest_plot(data, point = "hr", lower = "lo", upper = "hi", label = "study")
```

## Data columns

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| [`col_text()`](columns.qmd#col_text), [`col_label()`](columns.qmd#col_label) | Text / row-identifier columns |
| [`col_numeric()`](columns.qmd#col_numeric) | Numeric with formatting and abbreviation |
| [`col_n()`](columns.qmd#col_n) | Sample-size column (default thousands separator) |
| [`col_percent()`](columns.qmd#col_percent) | Percentage from proportion or 0–100 value |
| [`col_currency()`](columns.qmd#col_currency) | Numeric with currency symbol |
| [`col_pvalue()`](columns.qmd#col_pvalue) | P-value with smart formatting & stars |
| [`col_interval()`](columns.qmd#col_interval) | "1.20 (0.90, 1.50)" interval text |
| [`col_events()`](columns.qmd#col_events) | "events/n" clinical format |
| [`col_range()`](columns.qmd#col_range) | "min–max" range |
| [`col_date()`](columns.qmd#col_date) | Date with `strftime()` formatting |
| [`col_reference()`](columns.qmd#col_reference) | Truncated text + optional link |
| [`col_heatmap()`](columns.qmd#col_heatmap) | Numeric with interpolated background color |
| [`col_progress()`](columns.qmd#col_progress) | Inline progress bar |

## Inline visual columns

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| [`col_bar()`](columns.qmd#col_bar) | Per-row bar (no shared axis) |
| [`col_sparkline()`](columns.qmd#col_sparkline) | Inline sparkline (line / bar / area) |
| [`col_icon()`](columns.qmd#col_icon) | Icon / emoji per row |
| [`col_badge()`](columns.qmd#col_badge) | Colored status badge |
| [`col_stars()`](columns.qmd#col_stars) | Star rating |
| [`col_img()`](columns.qmd#col_img) | Inline image |

## Per-row visualization columns

These render a small chart per row with a shared x-axis.

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| [`viz_forest()`](columns.qmd#viz_forest) | Forest plot column (point + CI) |
| [`viz_bar()`](columns.qmd#viz_bar) | Horizontal bar chart |
| [`viz_boxplot()`](columns.qmd#viz_boxplot) | Box-and-whisker |
| [`viz_violin()`](columns.qmd#viz_violin) | Violin / KDE |

### Effect helpers

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| [`effect_forest()`](columns.qmd#effect_forest) | Define an effect for `viz_forest(effects = ...)` |
| [`effect_bar()`](columns.qmd) | Define a bar in `viz_bar(...)` |
| [`effect_boxplot()`](columns.qmd) | Define a boxplot in `viz_boxplot(...)` |
| [`effect_violin()`](columns.qmd) | Define a violin in `viz_violin(...)` |

### Column construction

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| [`col_group()`](columns.qmd#col_group) | Group columns under a shared header |
| [`web_col()`](columns.qmd#web_col) | Low-level constructor every `col_*()` delegates to |
| [`web_group()`](tabviz.qmd#grouping) | Define a row group explicitly |

## Styling modifiers

Fluent verbs that mutate a `WebSpec`, htmlwidget, or `tabviz_proxy`. See [Styling](styling.qmd).

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| [`set_row_style()`](styling.qmd#set_row_style) | Row-level styling (bold / color / type / indent / …) |
| [`set_column_style()`](styling.qmd#set_column_style) | Per-cell styling for one column |
| [`set_marker_style()`](styling.qmd#set_marker_style) | Marker color / shape / opacity / size |
| [`set_zoom()`](styling.qmd#set_zoom) | Zoom and container constraints |
| [`set_theme()`](styling.qmd#set_theme) | Apply a theme by name or object |
| [`selectable_themes()`](styling.qmd#selectable_themes) | Curate the in-widget theme switcher |

## Themes

### Preset themes

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| [`web_theme_cochrane()`](themes.qmd#web_theme_cochrane) | The package default — Cochrane teal + warm-coral accent, Inter, comfortable |
| [`web_theme_lancet()`](themes.qmd#web_theme_lancet)     | Lancet navy + refined gold, Georgia serif, comfortable |
| [`web_theme_jama()`](themes.qmd#web_theme_jama)         | JAMA all-B&W, ultra-compact, Arial |
| [`web_theme_dark()`](themes.qmd#web_theme_dark)         | Catppuccin Mocha-inspired dark canvas |
| [`web_theme()`](themes.qmd#web_theme)                   | Generic custom-theme constructor |
| [`package_themes()`](themes.qmd#package_themes)         | Named list of every shipped theme (Cochrane / Lancet / JAMA / Dark) |

### Theme modifiers

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| [`set_inputs()`](themes.qmd#set_inputs) | Tier 1 inputs (brand, accent, series, fonts, status) |
| [`set_variants()`](themes.qmd#set_variants) | Per-table variants (density, header_style, first_column_style) |
| [`set_spacing()`](themes.qmd#set_spacing) | Per-token spacing override on top of the density preset |
| [`set_theme_field()`](themes.qmd#set_theme_field) | Generic deep setter; `path` walks the theme tree |

## Annotations

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| [`refline()`](annotations.qmd#refline) | Vertical reference line |
| [`forest_annotation()`](annotations.qmd#forest_annotation) | Custom shape per study (frontend WIP) |

## Data operations

Same dispatch on `WebSpec` / htmlwidget / `tabviz_proxy` — see [Data operations](data-ops.qmd).

| Function | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`add_column()`](data-ops.qmd#add_column), [`remove_column()`](data-ops.qmd#remove_column) | Insert / remove columns |
| [`move_column()`](data-ops.qmd#move_column), [`resize_column()`](data-ops.qmd#resize_column) | Reposition / resize |
| [`update_column()`](data-ops.qmd#update_column) | Edit column properties |
| [`sort_rows()`](data-ops.qmd#sort_rows), [`filter_rows()`](data-ops.qmd#filter_rows), [`clear_filters()`](data-ops.qmd#clear_filters) | Order / filter rows |
| [`select_rows()`](data-ops.qmd#select_rows), [`move_row()`](data-ops.qmd#move_row) | Runtime row controls |
| [`update_data()`](data-ops.qmd#update_data) | Replace the data frame |
| [`toggle_group()`](data-ops.qmd#toggle_group) | Collapse / expand groups |
| [`set_cell()`](data-ops.qmd#set_cell), [`set_row_label()`](data-ops.qmd#set_row_label), [`clear_edits()`](data-ops.qmd#clear_edits) | Proxy-only cell edits |

## Interaction

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| [`web_interaction()`](interaction.qmd#web_interaction) | Build an `InteractionSpec` |
| [`web_interaction_full()`](interaction.qmd#web_interaction_full) | All capabilities on (default) |
| [`web_interaction_minimal()`](interaction.qmd#web_interaction_minimal) | Hover only |
| [`web_interaction_publication()`](interaction.qmd#web_interaction_publication) | Static / print preset |
| [`default_interaction_for_theme()`](interaction.qmd#default_interaction_for_theme) | Returns `web_interaction_full()` |

## Shiny

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| [`tabvizOutput()`](shiny.qmd#tabvizOutput) / [`renderTabviz()`](shiny.qmd#renderTabviz) | Standard output / render bindings |
| [`tabviz_proxy()`](shiny.qmd#tabviz_proxy) | Proxy for live updates |
| [`splitTabvizOutput()`](shiny.qmd#splitTabvizOutput) / [`renderSplitTabviz()`](shiny.qmd#renderSplitTabviz) | Split-table bindings |
| [`split_tabviz_proxy()`](shiny.qmd#split_tabviz_proxy) / [`split_tabviz_select()`](shiny.qmd#split_tabviz_select) | Split-table proxy |

## Export

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| [`save_plot()`](save_plot.qmd#save_plot) | Export a widget / spec to SVG, PDF, or PNG |
| [`save_split_table()`](save_plot.qmd#save_split_table) | Export every sub-plot of a `SplitForest` |

## Troubleshooting

[Troubleshooting guide](troubleshooting.qmd) — common errors and the recent (0.9.0) renames.
